case_title: WAN LI LI VS. WOYAN HUANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $150.00) SERVED FEB-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, WOYAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WAN LI LI WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN. DEFENDANTS WOYAN HUANG AND ANGELA TREVINO WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S, DEFENDANT TREVINO'S, AND DEFENDANT HUANG'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, WAN LI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, WOYAN $2,700.43 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.43, DEFENDANT WOYAN HAUNG SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF WAN LI LI 2700.43. (DEFENDANT ANGELA TREVINO TO PAY NOTHING.) (DEFENDANT ANGELA TREVINO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LI, WAN LI AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, WOYAN TREVINO, ANGELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $150.00) SERVED FEB-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TREVINO, ANGELA
DECLARATION OF CORRECT NAME FILED BY DEFENDANT HUANG, WOYAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ANGELA TREVINO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-15-2019 AT 1:30 PM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, WOYAN
